text.title: Immersive Design Principles Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Immersive Design Principles end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: comfort-defaults
step.action: Set snap turning on, vignette on, smooth-loco opt-in.

step.name: locomotion-choice
step.decision-gate: If smooth is only mode, STOP.

step.name: sensory-budget
step.action: Cap each per the rule; document overrides.

step.name: agency-check
step.action: For every required action, ensure a discoverable trigger; remove forced gaze.

step.name: retreat-spec
step.action: Add persistent return-home control reachable in ≤2 inputs.
